title: Make Invoices clear
excerpt: Currently, when you create an invoice on the side pane as a view of an item and download it as a pdf, it looks blurry. Do you know how to fix this?

posts.author: Marian (Marian Zapata)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, when you create an invoice on the side pane as a view of an item and download it as a pdf, it looks blurry. Do you know how to fix this?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Marian,

Currently, there is no fix present for this. For clearer PDFs, you can check out the Paysaro app. It offers clearer PDFs and much more…
